LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AS TO RESPONDENT MACKENZIE REAL CAPITAL, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Francesca M. Lanpher of the law offices of Keesal Young & Logan (415.398.6000) appears as counsel for petitioner

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Petitioners E*Trade Securities LLC'S petition to confirm arbitration award as to respondent MacKenzie Real Capital, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order and Judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
